name: DV360 — Bid Manager Reports
description: Display & Video 360 Bid Manager Reporting API (v2) connector. Runs a pre-existing DV360 query identified by `context.query_id`, polls until DONE, downloads the resulting CSV from the signed Google Cloud Storage URL the API returns, and parses the rows. Headers are normalised by the connector (spaces/colons/parens/slashes/dashes/dots → underscores, repeated underscores collapsed). Numeric-looking values are cast to int/float; date columns remain STRING because DV360 emits them as 'YYYY/MM/DD' — promoting them to DATE is post-MVP. The catalog of fields below is a representative superset of the most common dimensions and metrics across DV360 queries; the connector intersects them with whatever columns the query actually returns (see _filter_fields).

required.name: fields
required.description: List of available_fields names to retrieve. The connector intersects this list with the actual columns produced by the DV360 query; non-matching names are dropped with a warning.

required.name: data_range
required.description: DV360 dataRange enum that controls the time window for the report run. Use CUSTOM_DATES together with customStartDate + customEndDate for an explicit window.

optional.name: customStartDate
optional.description: Inclusive lower bound of the report window in YYYYMMDD format. Required when data_range = CUSTOM_DATES, ignored otherwise.

optional.name: customEndDate
optional.description: Inclusive upper bound of the report window in YYYYMMDD format. Required when data_range = CUSTOM_DATES, ignored otherwise.

optional.name: poll_timeout_sec
optional.description: Maximum seconds to wait for the DV360 report to reach DONE state. The connector raises POLL_TIMEOUT if the report is still RUNNING after this many seconds.

available_fields.name: Advertiser_ID
available_fields.description: DV360 advertiser id (stringified to preserve leading zeros).

available_fields.name: Advertiser_Currency
available_fields.description: ISO 4217 currency code reported for advertiser-currency metrics.

available_fields.name: Creative_Type
available_fields.description: DV360 creative type (e.g. Display, Video, Audio, Native).

available_fields.name: Date
available_fields.description: Report date as emitted by DV360 ('YYYY/MM/DD'). Kept as STRING for the MVP; cast to DATE in a post-MVP transform.

available_fields.name: Device_Type
available_fields.description: Connected device class (Desktop, Smart Phone, Tablet, Connected TV, etc.).

available_fields.name: Impressions
available_fields.description: Cast from CSV string to int by the connector.

available_fields.name: CTR
available_fields.description: Click-through rate. DV360 may emit as percentage or ratio depending on the query — preserved verbatim.

available_fields.name: Total_Media_Cost_Adv_Currency
available_fields.description: Total media cost (media + fees + data) in advertiser currency.

available_fields.name: Active_View_Eligible_Impressions
available_fields.description: Impressions eligible to be measured by Active View.

available_fields.name: Active_View_Viewable_Impressions
available_fields.description: Active View viewable impressions per MRC definition.

metadata.notes: DV360 query (context.query_id) must be created in DV360 ahead of time. The connector triggers queries/{id}:run, polls queries/{id}/reports/{report_id} until DONE, downloads the signed GCS URL from metadata.googleCloudStoragePath, and parses the CSV. Service account in client_<id>_dv360_service_account_json must have access to the DV360 partner/advertiser the query targets.
